hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); [ -z "$f" ] && exit 0; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|json|css|md)$' && npx prettier --write "$f" 2>/dev/null || true

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); [ -z "$f" ] && exit 0; echo "$f" | grep -qE '(brand\.ts|CLAUDE\.md|README\.md|messages/)' && exit 0; grep -qF 'TaxPax' "$f" 2>/dev/null && echo '{"systemMessage":"\u26a0 Hardcoded brand name found — import brand from @/config/brand"}' || true

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); [ -z "$f" ] && exit 0; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$' && echo "$f" | grep -qv 'logger\.ts$' && grep -qE 'console\.(log|warn|error|info|debug)' "$f" 2>/dev/null && echo '{"systemMessage":"\u26a0 console.* found — use logger from @/lib/logger instead"}' || true
